entity.summary: Decentralized central limit order book and on-chain trading infrastructure on Sui, providing shared liquidity and programmable spot-trading functionality for applications and traders.
entity.notes: HEI models DeepBook as one entity rather than separate V2 and V3 entities. Official Sui documentation identifies DeepBookV3 as the latest decentralized CLOB version and notes that V2 was deprecated.

evidence.title: DeepBook official website
evidence.notes: First-party website presents live DeepBook trading and builder surfaces and describes one order book powering Sui ecosystem liquidity.

evidence.title: DeepBookV3 documentation
evidence.notes: Official Sui documentation describes DeepBookV3 as a decentralized central limit order book built on Sui and states that DeepBookV2 was deprecated.

evidence.title: Mysten Labs DeepBook V3 repository
evidence.notes: Official open-source repository describes DeepBook V3 as a decentralized CLOB on Sui and provides current protocol code and documentation links.
